displeasure of the Government or his superiors and may
become a victim of calumny. If, however, the 10th lord is
in the 6th, 8th or 10th in Navamsa, aspected or

260 How to Judge a Horoscope
joined by benefics, the above evil results will be lessened.
Afflicted, the maximum of evil will happen.
When the 6th lord occupies the 11th with the 11th lord,
his gains in business, agriculture or in his occupation in
general, will be below normal. These results will happen
specially during the sub-period of the 6th lord. When the
6th lord is fortified, there will be gains from the maternal
uncle, but he will incur the displeasure of his own elder
brothers. If the 11th lord is stronger than the 6th lord, he
will conquer his enemies and overcome all opposition.
When the 6th lord occupies the 12th with the 12th lord,
he will suffer from troubles, losses and destruction in his
enemies' hands. He will become immoral. The affliction
will come from the source denoted by the bhava lord
